2025–2026 Fall Semester English Proficiency Exam

Dear Students,

The English Proficiency Exam at the end of the Fall Semester will be held on Tuesday, 13 January 2026.

Students who were not enrolled in the program during the Fall Semester of the 2025–2026 Academic Year and those who would like to take the exam under the provisions of Article 44C of the Council of Higher Education (YÖK) are required to register via the link below by 8 January 2026.

Registration link

The exam will take place in the School of Foreign Languages building at the Cibali Campus.

You can access the exam content details via the link below:

Content details

We present this information to you and wish you success.

Kind regards,

School of Foreign Languages
